ddls:
CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the artist */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the artist */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's image */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the artist */,
  "formation_year" INTEGER /* Year the artist or band was formed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the song */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album the song belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the song */,
  "instrumentalness" INTEGER /* Instrumentalness of the song */,
  "danceability" INTEGER /* Danceability of the song */,
  "energy" INTEGER /* Energy of the song */,
  "acousticness" INTEGER /* Acousticness of the song */,
  "happiness" INTEGER /* Happiness of the song */,
  "tempo" INTEGER /* Tempo of the song */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the song */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the song in seconds */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* URL to the song lyrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the album */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "cover_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the album cover image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "sub_genre" TEXT /* Sub-genre classification */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Cultural or geographical origin of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_genres" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, regular user) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who interacted with the song */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song interacted with */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., like, play, share) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* User-provided rating for the song (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* User-provided comment on the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the recommendation */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended song */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  "score" REAL /* Score indicating the strength of the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
